title: Barrels++
description: Fully Customize your barrels with Barrels++
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a5e11d9123fee67435399fe083bd5ba509608fa.png)

# Hello, Welcome to Barrels++
**This packs makes barrels wayy cooler** by adding types for barrels, **as seen here:**

> There are a total of **7** each with their signed type as of now.

[normal barrels also have a signed type]


> To change a barrel's texture you need to rename it

[btw everything is case insensitive so dont worry about stuff like "BArReL"]


<details>
<summary>Current barrel textures</summary>

**Type:
 <signed> barrel <content>**

- Barrel apple
- Barrel beetroot
- Barrel carrot
- Barrel cod
- Barrel empty
- Barrel potato
- Barrel salmon
</details>

<details>
<summary>IMPORTANT</summary>

as of now, **Barrel name dependent textures is broken.**

if you enable this pack and then relog (simply opening and closing your game) the barrel texture will reset and be normal.

you can use the **"Know my name!"** mod inorder to fix this issue

the mod: [https://modrinth.com/mod/know-my-name](https://modrinth.com/mod/know-my-name)
</details>
